caption: The video features an older man with white hair and glasses, wearing a patterned shirt adorned with a necklace, speaking into a microphone. He appears to be addressing an audience in a formal setting, possibly during a lecture or presentation. The background consists of wooden slats, suggesting an indoor venue such as a conference room or auditorium. As he speaks, he gestures with his hands, emphasizing his points. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating that the event may be related to this organization. The man's expression and body language convey a sense of passion and engagement with his topic.
